issues.title: [AI ECOSYSTEM][EPIC] Make Lang Assistant a standalone coach and gateway capability
issues.body:
## Outcome

Keep the local CLI independently usable while exposing reviewed English and Japanese coaching services to Quân Sư.

## Scope

- Single learner for the MVP.
- No Discord dependency.
- Language data, prompts, analytics, and coaching policy remain in this repository.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Requirements, contract, implementation, tests, QA, packaging, release, and maintenance are linked.
- [ ] The public service is separate from CLI presentation.
- [ ] No consumer reads private storage.

issues.title: [REQUIREMENTS] Reconcile standalone CLI and gateway language-coaching scope
issues.body:
## Outcome

Define the minimum common use cases shared by CLI and gateway without turning Discord wording into domain requirements.

## Scope

- Today's mission, answer correction, focused explanation/drill, mistake history update, and safe progress summary.
- Owner identity mapping, privacy, retention, export, and delete.
- Explicit non-goals for voice, multi-user, and cloud operation.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Each use case has structured input, output, validation, side effects, idempotency, and error behavior.
- [ ] CLI and gateway invoke the same application services.
- [ ] Advanced coaching is distinct from Mama's lightweight study tracking.

issues.title: [INTEGRATION] Expose a stable language application-service contract
match_titles: [INTEGRATION][TASK] Expose a stable application-service contract for local gateways
issues.body:
## Outcome

Publish a versioned Discord-independent contract for trusted local gateways.

## Scope

- Capability discovery, readiness, today's mission, submit correction, explanation/drill, and progress summary.
- Stable errors, deadlines, cancellation, and deterministic fixtures.
- No ANSI or human CLI parsing in machine mode.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Public interfaces do not expose tables or private modules.
- [ ] At least one end-to-end operation works through a fake provider and temporary storage.
- [ ] Contract validation does not require Ollama.
- [ ] Backward compatibility rules are documented.

issues.title: [IMPLEMENTATION] Build shared language application services for CLI and gateway
issues.body:
## Outcome

Implement framework-neutral use cases behind both presentation adapters.

## Scope

- Mission generation/retrieval, correction/retry, explanation/drill, mistakes, and progress.
- Explicit transaction and idempotency boundaries.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Services receive typed values, not Discord or CLI objects.
- [ ] Writes happen once before delivery.
- [ ] Cancellation and partial failure policies are tested.
- [ ] CLI behavior remains usable.

issues.title: [IMPLEMENTATION] Add structured prompts, Ollama validation, and deterministic fallback boundaries
issues.body:
## Outcome

Make coaching output predictable, versioned, and testable.

## Scope

- Versioned English/Japanese prompt contracts.
- Structured model response parsing and validation.
- Provider timeout/unavailable behavior and non-LLM deterministic validation.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Invalid model output fails safely.
- [ ] Prompts are not duplicated in the gateway or bot.
- [ ] Model and prompt versions are observable without logging learner content.
- [ ] Tests use fake providers by default.
